name: Suite Fresh All — every documented capability with fresh paraphrasing (50 cases)
description: One case per documented copilot capability in COPILOT_CAPABILITIES.md §2, using FRESH wording (different paraphrases than suite-regression-full) so the run tests verified-query generalization + the LLM/refinement fallback, not memorized question strings. Covers SEL/PROJ/FLT/TOP/CNT/DIS/AGG/GRP/JOI/ANT/CTE/MCTE/WIN/PCTL/PER/TRD/PCT/ANM/COH/HAV/DATE/RECCTE/CONV/KM/REF/ROBUST/TOOL.

Scenarios.Question: give me every ticket number
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: pull all user email addresses
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: display each user's username together with their email
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: show me critical priority tickets only
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: list tickets that are both open and critical
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets whose priority is either critical or high
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name IN ('Critical','High') AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets opened during the past 7 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: which tickets have already been resolved
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, ResolvedAt FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets whose title mentions login
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.Title LIKE '%login%' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: most recent 5 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: number of active users
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: total ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: all distinct ticket statuses
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT Name FROM TicketStatuses

Scenarios.Question: mean ticket resolution time in days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: date of the most recently resolved ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(ResolvedAt) AS LatestResolvedAt FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: oldest ticket created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MIN(CreatedAt) AS EarliestCreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets per status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets grouped by status and priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Status, p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name, p.Name ORDER BY Status, Priority

Scenarios.Question: top 5 users by tickets they created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 u.UserName, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketsCreated FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY TicketsCreated DESC

Scenarios.Question: each ticket together with its priority name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, p.Name AS Priority FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with their entity, status and priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, e.Name AS Entity, s.Name AS Status, p.Name AS Priority FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: users that have never opened a single ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: with a cte show daily ticket counts for the last 14 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH DailyCounts AS (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-14,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) SELECT Day, Count FROM DailyCounts ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: with two ctes compute monthly counts then keep only months above 30 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH MonthlyCounts AS (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')), Filtered AS (SELECT Month, Count FROM MonthlyCounts WHERE Count > 30) SELECT Month, Count FROM Filtered ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: use ctes to rank entities by ticket volume keeping top 3
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH EntityCounts AS (SELECT e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE e.IsActive = 1 GROUP BY e.Name), Ranked AS (SELECT Name, Count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY Count DESC) AS Rank FROM EntityCounts) SELECT Name, Count, Rank FROM Ranked WHERE Rank <= 3 ORDER BY Rank

Scenarios.Question: rank entities by their ticket volume
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(t.Id) DESC) AS Rank FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE e.IsActive = 1 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY Rank

Scenarios.Question: row number for tickets ordered by created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, CreatedAt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CreatedAt) AS RowNum FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt

Scenarios.Question: rank tickets within each entity by creation date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, e.Name AS Entity, t.CreatedAt, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY t.EntityId ORDER BY t.CreatedAt) AS Rank FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY Entity, Rank

Scenarios.Question: month over month change in ticket creation using lag
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Month, Count, Count - LAG(Count) OVER (ORDER BY Month) AS Delta FROM (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')) m ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: rolling 7 day average of tickets created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Day, Count, AVG(CAST(Count AS FLOAT)) OVER (ORDER BY Day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS Rolling7DayAvg FROM (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-90,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) d ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: running monthly cumulative ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Month, MonthlyCount, SUM(MonthlyCount) OVER (ORDER BY Month ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS CumulativeCount FROM (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS MonthlyCount FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')) m ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: median ticket resolution time
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) OVER () AS MedianDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: 95th percentile of ticket resolution time
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) OVER () AS P95Days FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: compare last 7 days vs the previous 7 days for tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Last7Days, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-14,GETDATE()) AND CreatedAt < DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Previous7Days FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created this month versus last month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisMonth, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,GETDATE())),MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH,-1,GETDATE())),1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets resolved this year versus last year
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(ResolvedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisYear, SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(ResolvedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastYear FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: compare current quarter vs last quarter ticket counts
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(QUARTER, CreatedAt, GETDATE()) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisQuarter, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(QUARTER, CreatedAt, GETDATE()) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastQuarter FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets per day for the last 14 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-14,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: monthly ticket trend over the last 6 months
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(MONTH,-6,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: this month resolution rate
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND ResolvedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS DECIMAL(6,2)) AS ResolutionRatePct FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: percent of unassigned tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN AssignedToUserId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS DECIMAL(6,2)) AS UnassignedPct FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: busiest day of the last 30 days for ticket creation
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 1 CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-30,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: average resolution time by priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name AS Priority, AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionDays FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name ORDER BY AvgResolutionDays DESC

Scenarios.Question: statuses with more than 50 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: age in days for every ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, GETDATE()) AS AgeDays FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: open tickets older than 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt, DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) AS AgeDays FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) > 30 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: all descendant tickets of TCK-2026-00072
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH TicketTree AS (SELECT Id, TicketNumber, Title, ParentTicketId, 0 AS Depth FROM Tickets WHERE TicketNumber = 'TCK-2026-00072' AND IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.ParentTicketId, tt.Depth + 1 FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketTree tt ON t.ParentTicketId = tt.Id WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0) SELECT TicketNumber, Title, Depth FROM TicketTree WHERE Depth > 0 ORDER BY Depth, TicketNumber

Scenarios.Question: ancestor chain of ticket TCK-2026-00072
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH ParentChain AS (SELECT Id, TicketNumber, Title, ParentTicketId, 0 AS DistanceFromStart FROM Tickets WHERE TicketNumber = 'TCK-2026-00072' AND IsDeleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.ParentTicketId, pc.DistanceFromStart + 1 FROM Tickets t JOIN ParentChain pc ON t.Id = pc.ParentTicketId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0) SELECT TicketNumber, Title, DistanceFromStart FROM ParentChain ORDER BY DistanceFromStart

Scenarios.Question: اعرض التذاكر المفتوحة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many tikets are open
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets created on date 1900-01-01
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE CAST(t.CreatedAt AS DATE) = '1900-01-01' AND t.IsDeleted = 0
